test_cases.description: Cold traffic social proof audit with no existing proof assets on the page -- tests sourcing plan generation

inputs.lp.traffic_type: Cold -- visitors who have never heard of this brand
inputs.lp.traffic_source: Paid social (Facebook Ads, Instagram Ads, TikTok Ads)
inputs.lp.goal: Sign up for a free trial

kb_documents_present.description: Scorecard output from prior run of lp-scorecard-analyzer

output_must_contain.proof_inventory_note: empty or minimal -- page lacks existing proof

test_cases.description: Warm traffic social proof audit with existing testimonials on the page -- tests proof optimization and redistribution

inputs.lp.traffic_type: Warm -- visitors who already know this brand or are existing customers
inputs.lp.goal: Upgrade to a paid plan or higher tier

kb_documents_present.description: Scorecard output from prior run of lp-scorecard-analyzer (warm)

output_must_contain.proof_inventory_note: should catalog existing testimonials found on page
